content.answer:
Hi All,

Please find the attached document for the October TWCB monthly management
meeting tomorrow.

1

Overall CB budget / FP&A update

   1.

   CB OKR
   2.

   CB topline & P&L
   -

      SLS - September performance
      -

      SCS and Lovito - September performance

2

Commercial Update

   1.

   *[For Update] CNCB: Banned/Frozen/Deleted (BFD) shop impact on topline*
   2.

   *[For Update] CNCB: SCS Performance Deep Dive + Next Steps*
   3.

3

Other Initiatives

*Nicholas Lim*
Shopee | Cross Border | Special Projects / TWCB

Hi all,

Sending over the follow-ups from TW's monthly meeting from today. Thank you.

# Key Topics Action Items PIC ETA
1 Banned / Frozen / Deleted (BFD) Shops - For Live shops, look into NPC and
how we can grow a select pool of these sellers
- Look into CNSIP to migrate top shops back into TW Nic / Kaishen Oct 31
2 Counter Coupang - Align on key categories i.e. F&B, Beauty and sellers
that we want to push with TW Local Yuna / Hyunji Oct 28
3 Counter Coupang - Share plan on how we want to catch up on assortment and
NPC Yuna / Hyunji Oct 23

Hi Ian,

Thank you. We plan to cover this in action item #1. We will first look into
the existing CB sellers vs Local sellers growth split by clusters, and look
into NPC and propose ways to improve, and also migrate sellers that quit
back into TW via CNSIP.

We have elaborated on this action item in the follow-up table below.
# Key Topics Action Items PIC ETA
1 Banned / Frozen / Deleted (BFD) Shops - Look into CNCB existing shops
growth vs Local split by clusters
- Work with TW Local on NPC comparison for CB vs Local
- Look into which components can we drive price lower
- Look into CNSIP and check on whether we have, or can migrate top sellers
over back to TW Nic / Kaishen Oct 31
2 Counter Coupang - Align on key categories i.e. F&B, Beauty and sellers
that we want to push with TW Local Yuna / Hyunji Oct 28
3 Counter Coupang - Share plan on how we want to catch up on assortment and
NPC Yuna / Hyunji Oct 23

content.question: On #3, can get back with updated SKU and NPC targets over time?

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Yes, we will start updating the NPC and SKU in our weekly email starting
this week.
Also, aligned that KR team will update you by this week on their assortment
and NPC catch up plan.
Hi Shuning, forwarding you KR's plan for Counter TB to Ian.
